caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio or a small office, as indicated by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and the clothing racks visible in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with a focused expression. The environment suggests a relaxed yet professional atmosphere, with various items like a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and a desk with a chair adding to the scene's informal yet organized feel. The logos in the corners indicate that this is part of the "Boss Talk 101 Podcast."
